term: Jarred You Out of the Experience
englishDefinitions: To suddenly distract or shock someone so they stop feeling immersed in what they were doing.
To interrupt an experience in a sudden and unpleasant way.
persianTranslation: ناگهان از حال‌وهوای تجربه بیرون آورد
موجب شد از تجربه بیرون بیاید
examples: The loud phone ring jarred me out of the experience.
A strange edit in the film jarred viewers out of the experience.
His rude comment jarred us out of the experience right away.
